title: Import Data
subtitle: Import your existing data from other time tracking services.

history.title: Import history
history.description: Every import creates a run you can undo from here. Runs that added data still attached to other work (invoiced time entries, invoices on imported customers) refuse to undo until you clean up the blocking rows first.
history.empty: No imports yet. Your next Harvest import will show up here with an Undo button.
history.forceUndoExplain: You can undo anyway — the manual data listed above will be cascade-deleted along with the imported records. Re-create those entries afterwards if you still need them.
